name: goaljaby-codex
description: Codex-native bridge from a PRD folder to Codex /goal — generates 5 Korean review docs plus a PLANS.md ExecPlan, then hands off a ready-to-copy /goal command after human approval.

interface.shortDescription: Turn a PRD folder into Korean review docs plus a Codex /goal handoff
interface.longDescription: Package the Codex-native goaljaby skill that converts a PRD folder into five Korean review documents (VALIDATION/RECOVERY/PLAN/PROGRESS equivalents) plus a PLANS.md ExecPlan, enforces a 4,000-character compact, shows a Korean review summary in chat, and after a mandatory approval gate hands off a ready-to-copy Codex /goal command.
defaultPrompt: Convert this PRD folder into Korean review docs and a PLANS.md ExecPlan, then give me a /goal command to run.
Use goaljaby to bridge my PRD into a Codex /goal-driven long-running session.
Prep VALIDATION/RECOVERY/PLAN/PROGRESS docs from my PRD and a ready-to-copy /goal handoff.
